text: CROOK COUNTY KIDS CLUB AFTER SCHOOL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides enriching after-school programming. 1875 Ne Iron Horse Drive Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Elementary school age students Hours: Monday-Friday after school until 6pm Email (541) 447-7661 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main Phone (541) 447-7661 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by program DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Steins Pillar, Crooked River, and Barnes Butte Elementary Schools Services: Camps General Recreational Activities/Sports Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - SUMMER PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment.
